name: Buttermilk Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the dry ingredients into a mixing bowl. Sift and cut in shortening.
2. Stir in buttermilk until thoroughly mixed.
3. Turn dough onto a lightly-floured board, knead, and roll to about 1/2 inch thickness.
4. Transfer to a greased baking pan and brush tops with melted butter.
5. Bake at 450°F for 12 to 15 minutes. Serve hot.
